message:
fix: add nil guard on rigCfg and read boolean MQ vars from bead labels

Followup to #2610:
- Add nil check on rigCfg before accessing DefaultBranch (consistency
  with sling_helpers.go which already had the guard)
- Include boolean MQ vars (integration_branch_refinery_enabled,
  integration_branch_auto_land, run_tests, delete_merged_branches) in
  the bead-label fallback path so rigs using layered config get the
  same var coverage as rigs with settings/config.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
